final:
module DAC_24bit (  
    input [23:0] digital_input,  
    output reg [23:0] analog_output  
);  
    always @* begin  
        analog_output = digital_input; // Direct mapping for DAC simulation  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      analog_output <= ~digital_input;
    end
  end

endmodule
